title: Salesforce import and data mapping backend-first contract
salesforce_visible_capabilities: Source field to target field mapping

current_ui_boundary: Matter billing may expose the tested payment import action backed by POST /api/finance/payments
Matter bulk status completion may expose the tested POST /api/matters/bulk/status-transitions route
Client Account/Contact create and patch surfaces may expose tested CRM runtime facade writes
No generic Client/Matter import wizard, CSV upload, field mapping stepper, dry-run import, execute import, rollback, or error-report UI may appear before mounted API tests exist
Existing payment import is not Salesforce-style import/data mapping parity

route_policy_contract.service_boundary: Read tenant-scoped import job metadata and safe status only; source file contents, raw rows, and direct personal identifiers omitted
Create staged import job for allowlisted target objects only; no target records are mutated at job creation
Read object/field registry for allowlisted import targets and required permission scopes; admin metadata writes are out of scope
Stage source file manifest and parsed safe column profile; raw file bytes and raw row values stay outside API response
Return sampled, redacted, row-count-safe preview plus validation summary; raw row payloads and omitted counts are not returned
Persist source field to target field mappings only for allowlisted target fields; unsafe direct Matter creation, raw contact values, and privilege labels are blocked
Validate mappings, duplicate policy, permission scope, target constraints, and rollback plan without mutating Client, Matter, Billing, or DMS records
Execute only after passed dry-run, owner-approved target policy, idempotency key, and rollback plan exist; mutation receipt must list safe counts and audit ids only
Rollback or compensate executed import using receipt-bound operations only; no silent success and no raw failed-row leakage
Read safe error categories, row labels, and remediation hints only; raw rows, raw personal identifiers, and storage pointers omitted

safe_output_rules: privilege labels and legal holds cannot be imported by generic mapping
raw contact values stay redacted in preview and error report
duplicate handling must use duplicate review contract before canonical writes
execution receipt returns safe counts and audit ids only
rollback receipt required for every executed batch

owner_decisions_required: field-level mapping allowlist and required fields per target
duplicate handling policy and review threshold
source file retention and deletion policy
who may approve execution after dry-run
rollback versus compensation strategy per target object
whether an external embedded importer such as OneSchema is allowed
external_provider_dependencies: None required for first-party CSV/manifest import
Optional embedded importer provider such as OneSchema requires separate owner/security decision
verification_cases: VC-SF-B-W05-API-001: list import jobs returns safe metadata and no raw source rows
VC-SF-B-W05-API-002: create import job stages metadata only and mutates no target records
VC-SF-B-W05-API-003: import targets read returns allowlisted objects and fields only
VC-SF-B-W05-API-004: source file staging stores manifest/profile and omits bytes/raw rows from response
VC-SF-B-W05-API-005: preview returns redacted sample rows and count-leak-safe validation summary
VC-SF-B-W05-API-006: mapping write rejects blocked target objects, unsafe fields, and direct Matter creation shortcuts
VC-SF-B-W05-API-007: dry-run validates mappings, duplicates, permissions, and rollback plan without mutations
VC-SF-B-W05-API-008: execute requires passed dry-run, idempotency key, owner policy, and audit receipt
VC-SF-B-W05-API-009: rollback produces receipt-bound reversal or compensation evidence
VC-SF-B-W05-API-010: error report hides raw rows, raw personal identifiers, and storage pointers
VC-SF-B-W05-UI-001: Client/Matter UI exposes no import wizard, mapping stepper, run import, rollback, or error report controls before route tests pass

required_before_ui_exposure: OMO CodeGraph caller check for import job, mapping, dry-run, execute, rollback, and error-report handlers
Hermes MCP check-only: hermes.validate.core and hermes.desktop_authority_boundary

decision_boundary: This contract registers backend-first work only. It does not authorize import wizard UI, generic CSV upload, field mapping stepper, import execution, rollback controls, external importer providers, production, deployment, final approval, or enterprise trust claims.
